title: arum alternum
intro: Arum alternum, also known as the wild arum or dragon arum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Arum family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Arum alternum include reducing inflammation, fighting off bacteria and viruses, and promoting wound healing. Arum alternum can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to support immune function and overall health.
